svg.text: Enterprise-grade orchestration of 60+ specialized AI agents. Unlike simple prompt chains, Ruflo dynamically structures
agents into optimal topologies and uses distributed consensus to guarantee code quality and system reliability.
Dynamic agent organization structures optimized for specific computational task profiles.
Protocols used by the agent swarm to agree on task state, detect failures, and guarantee output quality.
Diverse roles with unique prompts, tools, and quality standards.
Shared Tools: Vector DB, CI/CD APIs, Code Interpreters
